interface.longDescription:
HG Insights - Revenue Growth Intelligence gives sales teams instant access to comprehensive prospect data. 
Get technology stacks, company firmographics, decision-maker contacts, IT spending insights, and contract intelligence for any company. 
Simply ask about a company by name or domain to uncover actionable sales intelligence powered by HG Insights data. 
Requires a RGI Developers or RGI Agents account from HG Insights.
defaultPrompt: Find high-fit accounts in HG Insights showing buyer intent and summarize the best sales plays.
Use HG Insights to size this market and identify priority segments for our GTM plan.
Enrich these target accounts with HG Insights technographics, spend data, and buying signals.
